summary: Added LIT_FLAG boolean variable to parse-command-args.sh (and its extension core copy) following the established flag pattern. Five insertions each: header comment, initialization to 'false', --lit detection block, sed strip line in FOCUS_PROMPT chain, and LIT_FLAG added to the export line. Both files are byte-for-byte identical (diff confirmed). All 4 verification tests passed: LIT_FLAG=true when --lit present, LIT_FLAG=false when absent, --lit stripped from FOCUS_PROMPT, and --lit coexists cleanly with --hard and --clean.
